name: Global Forest Watch API
description: The GFW Data API provides programmatic access to forest monitoring data, including tree cover loss, alerts, and land use datasets. It uses a ReDoc-powered OpenAPI interface for data exploration and retrieval.

auth_details.description: Access to certain datasets and higher rate limits require an API key.

endpoints.description: Retrieve the full OpenAPI specification for the GFW Data API.

error_codes.401: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid API key
error_codes.403: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions for the dataset
error_codes.404: Not Found - The requested resource or dataset does not exist
error_codes.429: Too Many Requests - Rate limit exceeded

doc_sources.title: Create and use an API key | Help Center
